indication: Breast cancer (HER2+, HER2-low), Gastric cancer, NSCLC
technical_audit: Gold standard for high-DAR (8.0) strategy. Hydrophilic GGFG linker prevents aggregation. DXd payload is cell-cycle independent and highly membrane-permeable, enabling potent bystander effect in HER2-low tumors.

safety.notes: ILD is the critical DLT; requires proactive monitoring.

immunogenicity.notes: Very low immunogenicity due to highly stable design.

technical_audit: Benchmark for vc-PABC-MMAE platform. DAR 4.0 stochastic conjugation. Highly effective in CD30+ hematological malignancies due to rapid internalization.

efficacy.notes: Standard of care for CD30+ Hodgkin Lymphoma.

immunogenicity.notes: Persistent ADA in ~7%; impacts PK but rarely efficacy.

technical_audit: First-generation non-cleavable linker ADC. Relies on complete lysosomal degradation of antibody. DM1-lysine metabolite is active but lacks bystander effect, limiting efficacy in heterogeneous tumors.
First FDA-approved ADC (2000). Uses pH-sensitive hydrazone linker. IgG4 framework used to minimize Fc effector function.
High-DAR (7.6) with pH-sensitive CL2A linker. Rapid release of SN-38 in acidic endosomes and tumor microenvironment. High bystander effect compensates for TROP-2 heterogeneity.
Fully human IgG1 (XenoMouse-derived) targeting Nectin-4. Standard vc-PABC-MMAE platform with DAR 3.8.
Humanized IgG1 targeting CD79b. Benchmark for B-cell lymphoma ADC using vc-PABC-MMAE platform.
First PBD-dimer ADC approved. Low DAR 2.3 required due to extreme payload potency. Uses PEGylated Val-Ala linker for solubility.
First ADC approved for FRalpha-high ovarian cancer. Uses disulfide-cleavable Sulfo-SPDB linker with DM4 payload.
Afucosylated IgG1 for enhanced ADCC. Non-cleavable mc-MMAF platform. Associated with ocular toxicity (corneal microcysts).
Targets Tissue Factor (TF). Standard vc-PABC-MMAE platform. Key for metastatic cervical cancer.

indication: HER2+ Gastric, Urothelial, and Breast Cancer
technical_audit: China's first approved ADC. High affinity HER2 binder with distinct epitope from Trastuzumab. Standard vc-PABC-MMAE DAR 4.
BLA voluntarily withdrawn (May 2025) after HERTHENA-Lung02 failed to meet OS significance in NSCLC. Remains in development for other HER3+ indications (15+ cancer types). High DAR 8.0 DXd platform.

safety.notes: Profile similar to other DXd ADCs.

indication: EGFR-mutated Locally Advanced or Metastatic NSCLC
technical_audit: Approved (June 2025) for pre-treated NSCLC. Optimized DAR 4.0 strategy (vs 8.0 for Enhertu) to improve safety profile for TROP2.

efficacy.notes: Approved for EGFR-mutated NSCLC. HR 0.63 in HR+/HER2- BC.

safety.notes: Stomatitis is the hallmark toxicity for Dato-DXd.

immunogenicity.notes: Likely low based on DXd platform.

technical_audit: FDA Breakthrough Therapy for SCLC. Targets B7-H3 (CD276). DXd platform with DAR 4.0.

immunogenicity.notes: Typically low for DXd platform based on Enhertu profile.

indication: HER2+ Breast Cancer, Gastric Cancer, HER2-low BC
technical_audit: Hengrui's flagship HER2 ADC. High DAR 8 Topo1i platform. Competing with Enhertu in HER2-low BC and Gastric cancer.

indication: mTNBC, HR+/HER2– Metastatic Breast Cancer, NSCLC
technical_audit: Kelun/Merck collaboration. Highly stable sulfonyl linker (K-Link) with DAR 7.4. Superior PK profile vs Trodelvy in breast cancer.

efficacy.notes: OptiTROP-Breast01 Phase 3. ORR up to 77.6% in combo with PD-L1 in NSCLC.

safety.notes: Stomatitis is a frequent Grade 3 AE.

technical_audit.logic_check: First-in-class Bcl-xL ADC; targets B7-H3 to deliver apoptotic payload.

failure_analysis.internal_insight: Failed to meet PFS/OS endpoints in NSCLC Phase 3. Competition from Dato-DXd (higher DAR, bystander effect) likely reduced commercial viability.

technical_audit: DM4 payload on CEACAM5. Failed Phase 3 CARMEN-LC03 trial. Modest efficacy benefit compared to docetaxel. CEACAM5 shedding and partial recycling may have limited intracellular payload accumulation.

technical_audit.logic_check: DNA alkylator requires low DAR. Ocular toxicity is a known class effect.
Targeting Tregs in TME; Guillain-Barre syndrome risk observed.
Standard Seagen platform applied to ROR1.
Eribulin payload provides bystander effect; differentiated from DM4.
High DAR 10 polymer scaffold; bleeding events led to clinical hold.

technical_audit: Targets c-Met overexpressing NSCLC. Uses standard vc-PABC-MMAE platform. Phase 3 LUMINOSITY ongoing.
Bispecific EGFRxHER3 ADC. Uses proprietary TOP1i payload Ed-04.
High-DAR Topo1i platform. Competing for first-in-class CLDN18.2 ADC approval in China.
First CLDN18.2 ADC to show clinical signal. Licensed to AstraZeneca for $1.1B. vc-PABC-MMAE platform.

technical_audit.logic_check: Site-specific DAR 2 using pAF; highly stable non-cleavable linker.

failure_analysis.internal_insight: Probody masking failed to completely prevent off-target toxicity. Ocular and neuropathic toxicities occurred. Narrow therapeutic window led to discontinuation.

technical_audit.logic_check: Utilizes TMALIN platform for TME-specific extracellular cleavage, overcoming low internalization of some targets.

indication: Platinum-resistant Ovarian Cancer, Peritoneal/Fallopian Tube Cancer
technical_audit: Phase 2 REJOICE-Ovarian01: 50.0% ORR at 5.6 mg/kg dose. Moving to Phase 3 vs chemotherapy. CDH6-directed ADC with DXd platform.

efficacy.notes: REJOICE-Ovarian01 Phase 2 data presented at ESMO 2025.

safety.notes: 4 cases of ILD reported in all-dose cohort.

technical_audit: Targeting MUC1 using the validated DXd platform.
Targets CLDN18.2. Kelun's proprietary Topo1i platform (K-Link).
Targets Nectin-4. Collaboration with MSD (MK-3120).

indication: Advanced Gastric or Gastroesophageal Junction (GEJ) Cancer
technical_audit: Targets CLDN18.2. Licensed to Merck KGaA for $1.4B. High DAR Topo1i rezetecan payload.
Targets CD79b for B-NHL. In Phase 3 development in China.
Targets HER3. Fast Track for NSCLC. Evidence: PMID:36045843.
Targets HER2. Cleavable vc-PABC linker with MMAE payload.
Targets EGFR. Uses standard vc-PABC MMAE platform.
Site-specific conjugation using unnatural amino acid (pAcPhe) at position 121 of heavy chain. Precise DAR 2.0.
Site-specific conjugation using Dolasynthen platform to achieve precise DAR 6. AF-HPA is a proprietary auristatin derivative.
Targets B7-H4. Uses Dolasynthen platform with auristatin payload.
Humanized IgG1 antibody (clone hL49) targeting CD228. Evidence: PMID:36800443.
Targets Integrin beta-6. Vedotin ADC. Evidence: PMID:37619980.
Targets Sialyl-Tn (STn) antigen. Terminated in Phase 1 (2024).
Targets c-Met. Phase 3 for CRC. Evidence: NCT05029882.
Targets SEZ6. Uses calicheamicin payload.
Targets LRRC15. Phase 1 development.
Targets CD123. Phase 2/3 development.
Next-generation FRalpha ADC targeting low expression tumors.
Targets HER2. Terminated in Phase 3.
Targets Trop2. Discontinued at Phase 1.
Targets Trop2. Phase 1 development.
Targets Mesothelin (MSLN). RemeGen proprietary antibody with vc-MMAE platform.

efficacy.notes: Strong signal in MSLN-high ovarian cancer.

safety.notes: Safety profile consistent with vc-MMAE platform.

technical_audit: Targets c-Met. Phase 2 for solid tumors overexpressing c-Met.
Targets CLDN18.2. Phase 1 development.
Targets CLDN18.2. Phase 1 development.
Targets GPRC5D. Licensed to AstraZeneca.
DualityBio HER2 ADC. FDA Breakthrough Designation. Partnered with BioNTech.
Targets B7-H3. DITAC platform candidate.
Targets B7-H3. DITAC platform candidate with high potency Topo1i payload.
Targets HER3 (ERBB3). Developed by MediLink/BioNTech.
Targets c-Met. Uses TMALIN platform. Licensed to Roche (2024).
Targets NaPi-2b. Uses MediLink TMALIN platform.
Targets CLDN18.2. Developed by Conjupro/CSPC. Phase 1 (NCT05043987).
Site-specific HER2 ADC. NDA accepted in China (2025).
Estimated based on Kelun-Biotech's proprietary Topo1i platform.
TROP2-directed ADC (SKB264). Phase 3 development.
RET targeted ADC (also known as KL-A400).
